title: Codex
description: A journal mechanic full of discoveries players need to unlock to access server lore.
body:
# FULL WIKI ON THIS LINK: [https://ajneb97.gitbook.io/codex](https://ajneb97.gitbook.io/codex) # DISCORD SUPPORT: (This is a Spanish Discord, however there is a category for both spanish and english support. Go to the "Plugins Ajneb97" category and there you can ask for help in the "general" channel. If you need MY help specifically, you can ask me in the discussion of the plugin on SpigotMC) [CLICK HERE](https://discord.gg/vTaqTuTBRp) # SPIGOTMC POST: [CLICK HERE](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/90371/) # SCREENSHOTS
SCREENSHOTS
# IMAGE TRANSCRIPTION
IMAGE TRANSCRIPTION What can I do with the plugin? This plugin allows you to create a Discoveries Inventory where your players can access information about specific regions, people, monsters they've encountered. Codex is a plugin that adds a little bit of RPG experience to your Minecraft server, by providing context and lore to the player. Details You can create any Discovery you want, players will unlock them by entering regions for the first time, talking to NPCs, killing monsters, and you can even unlock discoveries to players by using a console command! So the plugin allows you to create discoveries associated with aspects of other plugins. To create very customized discoveries I suggest you use my plugin ConditionalEvents, there is a tutorial in the WIKI. The plugin is highly inspired in RPG videogames like Mass Effect! Features Discoveries Properties - Discoveries Categories - Name + Description - Ways to unlock: > Entering WorldGuard regions > Killing vanilla mobs > Killing MythicMobs mobs > Using console command - Reward actions > Messages > Console commands > Sounds > Title messages - Click actions on unlocked discoveries - Date unlocked Extensive Configuration - Complete and easy to understand config, allowing to create fully customized discoveries Inventory Properties - Completely configurable - Multiple inventories/pages - Fully customizable items - Codex inventory custom items: > Category item > Unlocked item > Blocked item Other Features - MySQL - PlaceholderAPI variables - Plugin errors verify system - Works on 1.16.5+ Commands and Permissions Commands: /codex Opens the main menu. /codex unlock Unlocks a discovery for a player. /codex resetplayer Resets a player discovery. /codex open Opens an inventory for the player. /codex reload Reloads the config. /codex verify Checks the plugin for errors. Permissions: codex.admin Access all plugin commands.
